title: Albert Aparicio Garcia
text:
Research Engineer — Atmospheric Composition Group
Barcelona Supercomputing Center (BSC-CNS)
📍 Barcelona, Catalonia
I am a physicist and meteorologist working at the Atmospheric Composition group of the Barcelona Supercomputing Center. My work focuses on emission data processing, pollutant emission estimation methodologies, and modelling. Previously, I worked as a Climate Services Technician at the Meteorological Service of Catalonia (SMC), where I developed tools for climate monitoring, data quality control, and user-facing meteorological reports.

{{< fa envelope >}} Email {{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn

title: Albert Aparicio Garcia
text:
Research Interests

Atmospheric composition — emission inventories, pollutant dispersion modelling
Climate services — climate monitoring, degree-day databases, extreme event reporting
Numerical modelling — WRF, AERMOD, CALPUFF, air quality modelling
Data science — Python, R, GIS (ArcGIS, QGIS), SQL, climate data analysis
